column5: Brown, gravelly silty medium to coarse SAND. (FILL)
Concrete with GRAVEL and COBBLES of moderately decomposed granite and red bricks. (FILL)
Angular GRAVEL, COBBLES and BOULDERS of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with some brown, silty SAND and some concrete fragments. (FILL)

Moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced, very narrow to extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained and kaolin coated joints, dipping 10-20 and 40-50.
